name: @maronn-oidc/e2e
description: Playwright E2E tests for CLI-generated OpenID Provider samples

scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run test:e2e:hono && pnpm run test:e2e:express && pnpm run test:e2e:fastify && pnpm run test:e2e:nextjs
scripts.test:e2e:hono: pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/cli build && pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/sample-hono build && E2E_OP_PACKAGE=@maronn-oidc/sample-hono E2E_OP_PORT=3010 E2E_CLIENT_PORT=3020 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_PORT=3030 E2E_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:3010 E2E_CLIENT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3020 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3030 playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:express: pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/cli build && pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/sample-express build && E2E_OP_PACKAGE=@maronn-oidc/sample-express E2E_OP_PORT=3110 E2E_CLIENT_PORT=3120 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_PORT=3130 E2E_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:3110 E2E_CLIENT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3120 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3130 playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:fastify: pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/cli build && pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/sample-fastify build && E2E_OP_PACKAGE=@maronn-oidc/sample-fastify E2E_OP_PORT=3210 E2E_CLIENT_PORT=3220 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_PORT=3230 E2E_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:3210 E2E_CLIENT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3220 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3230 playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:nextjs: pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/cli build && pnpm --filter @maronn-oidc/sample-nextjs build && E2E_OP_PACKAGE=@maronn-oidc/sample-nextjs E2E_OP_PORT=3310 E2E_CLIENT_PORT=3320 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_PORT=3330 E2E_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:3310 E2E_CLIENT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3320 E2E_RESOURCE_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3330 playwright test
